cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out which of these options is a humorous edit of the movie "Mean Girls." Let's start by looking at each option and comparing it to the original name. The original title is "Mean Girls." Let me break it down into parts. The word "Mean" is spelled M-E-A-N, and "Girls" is G-I-R-L-S. A humorous edit might involve changing one letter to create a funny or silly variation, maybe making it look like a typo or a play on words.
